full_description: there are three RGB blocks on the table, red is already at table center, pick the green block and stack it on the red block
schema: {A} notifies the red block, {B} notifies the green block, {a} notifies the arm to manipulate the green block
preference: num of words should not exceed 16. Degree of detail avg 7
seen: Use {a} to pick {B} and stack it on {A}.
Pick up {B} and place it on top of {A}.
With {a}, lift {B} and set it atop {A}.
Carry {B} with {a} and place it on {A}.
Stack the {B} block on the {A} block.
unseen: Place {B} over {A} to form a stack.
